The SocketClient class handles the communication between the client and the server using sockets.

The StarterFront class represents the front face of a StarterCard This class is a subclass of Face and it adds the central Content list.

Structure - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Enum Structure Description: This enum represents different possible structures required by some objective cards, the structured ones.
StructuredObjectiveCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Class StructuredObjectiveCard Description: This class represents an objective card that requires a specific structure to be completed.

Constructor for the StructuredObjectiveCard class.
sum(Coordinate) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Coordinate
Returns a new Coordinate object whose coordinates are the sum of the coordinates of this Coordinate and the specified Coordinate.
